content:
Leo June 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Shift and transition — Jupiter arrives in your sign on June 29 and your luckiest year in 12 begins
Key Dates New Moon Jun 14 (Gemini, 11th house) / Full Moon Jun 29 (Capricorn, 6th house) / Jupiter enters Leo Jun 29
Love Friendship and community widen before the spotlight returns
Career Background networking now, public launch after your birthday
Crystal of the Month Sunstone
Lucky Colors Gold, amber, sunlit orange
Lucky Number 1
Affirmation I let the year prepare me; the light arrives on its schedule, not mine.

This Month’s Energy

Leo, June 2026 ends one chapter and opens another. The first three weeks are still in your 11th and 12th house season — community, friendship, then rest. But on June 29, the year’s biggest transit lands in your sign: Jupiter enters Leo, beginning a 12-month chapter of expansion, visibility, and opportunity you have not seen since mid-2014. The same day, the Capricorn Full Moon lights up your 6th house of work and routine, and Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer (your 12th house). Translation: the year turns in your favor on June 29, but the launch energy arrives in waves through August. June’s job is to prepare the ground.

Key Dates for Leo in June 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Leo Do / Avoid
Jun 14 Super New Moon in Gemini 11th house — fresh starts in friendship, community, networks, future vision Do: join the group, host the gathering, name the future you want
Avoid: going it alone when allies are available
Jun 19 Chiron enters Taurus 10th house — 8-year healing of career wounds, public-image wounds, authority wounds Do: name the career wound you’ve hidden, get mentorship, heal the father-pattern
Avoid: performing confidence while avoiding the inner work
Jun 29 Capricorn Full Moon + Jupiter enters Leo + Mercury Rx begins 6th house work climax + 12-year luck cycle opens in your sign; Mercury Rx in 12th house of rest Do: celebrate, declare your year’s intention publicly, rest
Avoid: launching anything major during Mercury Rx (June 29–Jul 23)
Jun 4 Venus enters Taurus 10th house Venus — public love, career magnetism, a professional crush Do: show up publicly, network upward, accept the visible role
Avoid: hiding your light
Jun 9 Mars enters Virgo 2nd house Mars — income pace picks up, watch for friction over money Do: raise your rate, claim the invoice, defend the price
Avoid: undercharging to keep peace
Jun 21 Sun enters Cancer 12th house season — rest, retreat, closure before your birthday Do: rest more, journal, release what no longer fits
Avoid: scheduling a launch before your birthday

Career & Money

The career story for Leo in June is “get ready”. Venus in Taurus from June 4 sits in your 10th house of public reputation — you are visible, liked, and upwardly mobile. Chiron’s entry into Taurus on June 19 begins an 8-year healing of career wounds — the boss who doubted you, the parent who didn’t see you, the authority-block you’ve internalized. Name the wound and the year opens.

Then on June 29, Jupiter enters Leo, beginning your most expansive career year in over a decade. Promotions, public recognition, leadership opportunities, going out on your own — all favored across the next 12 months. The catch: Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer (your 12th house) the same day, so the launch energy arrives in waves. Declare the intention now; expect the actual rollout to begin after July 23. Mars in Virgo (your 2nd house) from June 9 supports raising your rate. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is naming your year’s income goal out loud.

Love & Relationships

Venus in your 10th house from June 4 makes love and visibility intertwine — a professional crush, a romance that begins at work, a partner who supports your public life. The Gemini New Moon on June 14 (your 11th house) opens friendship and community doors; many Leos will meet someone significant through a group this month.

The deeper love story arrives with Jupiter entering your sign on June 29. Over the next 12 months, Jupiter in Leo expands your magnetism — single Leos are more likely to meet someone significant, and coupled Leos may renew vows or take a relationship public. The catch: Mercury retrograde in your 12th house from June 29 surfaces old relationship patterns and hidden feelings. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is honesty with yourself about what you actually want.

Health & Wellness

The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 falls in your 6th house of routine, work, and body — a climax around a health or habit commitment. Many Leos will see a fitness goal peak, a routine lock in, or a health concern demand attention. Sunstone, your traditional stone, supports the solar energy your body runs on — keep it on your windowsill in morning light.

The Sun entering Cancer on June 21 begins your 12th house season of rest. Honor it. Jupiter arriving in your sign on June 29 is the year’s biggest energy shift; arrive at it rested, not depleted. Mars in Virgo (your 2nd house) from June 9 can stress the nervous system around money — notice it. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Sunstone

Why Sunstone fits Leo this month. You are Sun-ruled, and on June 29 the year’s biggest transit — Jupiter entering your sign — opens a 12-month chapter of solar expansion. Sunstone, traditionally tied to the sun and to leadership, warmth, and confident visibility, is the stone that helps you receive Jupiter’s gift without burning out or shrinking from it. It is, simply, your stone for the year’s turning point.

How to use it during June 2026. Wear Sunstone as a ring or pendant from June 21 (Sun enters your 12th house — rest season) through July. Hold it in your receiving hand on June 29 during the Jupiter-in-Leo entry — 10 minutes of breathing with the stone over your heart to receive the year’s energy.

Best date to use it: June 29, the day Jupiter enters Leo — Sunstone on your heart during a 10-minute morning practice, naming the year you want to live.

Read more: Sunstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Leo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Leo — June 2026

When: June 29, Jupiter enters Leo (your 1st house).
Crystal: Sunstone.
Intention: Receive the 12-year luck cycle consciously.

  1. Cleanse Sunstone in direct sunlight on the morning of June 29 for 15 minutes.
  2. Set the intention on the 1st house theme: write down three things you want to be true by July 2027 — one about career, one about love, one about who you become.
  3. Act by declaring one of those intentions publicly within 30 days — to a friend, on social media, or in a journal you’ll share with a mentor.
  4. Reflect at the Leo New Moon in August: which intention already feels real? Carry Sunstone during the review.

Shop Leo Crystals for June 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with confidence, leadership, visibility, and solar energy — including the Sunstone that anchors your luckiest year in 12. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Leo June 2026

Is June 2026 a good month for Leo?

Yes — the best of the year, conditional on patience. The first three weeks are rest and preparation. The year turns on June 29 when Jupiter enters your sign, but Mercury also turns retrograde that day, so the launch energy arrives in waves through August.

What does Jupiter entering Leo mean for Leo?

Jupiter enters your sign once every 12 years and begins a 12-month chapter of expansion, opportunity, and visibility. Promotions, public recognition, going out on your own, becoming a parent, falling in love — all favored across the next year.

How should Leo handle Mercury retrograde in Cancer from June 29?

It falls in your 12th house of rest and the unconscious — so the retrograde asks for inner work, not outer launches. Rest, journal, release old patterns. Avoid major public announcements between June 29 and July 23.

What is the best crystal for Leo in June 2026?

Sunstone — your solar stone, matched to the year’s biggest transit (Jupiter entering Leo). Wear it from June 21 through August. See the full Leo crystal guide →

How does Chiron entering Taurus affect Leo career?

Chiron in your 10th house begins an 8-year healing of career wounds — the boss who doubted you, the parent who didn’t see you, the authority-block you’ve internalized. Naming the wound opens the year.

Should Leo launch a major project in late June 2026?

Not advised. The energy is right (Jupiter in your sign), but Mercury Rx from June 29 scrambles the rollout. Declare the intention now; expect the actual launch to begin after July 23.
